is_surviving_legally_cohabiting_partner_.name: is_surviving_legally_cohabiting_partner_of
is_surviving_legally_cohabiting_partner_.description: The first person is the surviving legally cohabiting partner of the second person (the deceased).

estate_has_opened.name: estate_has_opened
estate_has_opened.description: The estate of the deceased person has opened.

served_as_family_principal_residence.name: served_as_family_principal_residence
served_as_family_principal_residence.description: The property served as the family principal residence at the time the estate of the deceased opened.

is_household_effects_in.name: is_household_effects_in
is_household_effects_in.description: The asset consists of household effects present in the given immovable property.

subject_to_legal_reversion_4_24.name: subject_to_legal_reversion_4_24
subject_to_legal_reversion_4_24.description: The immovable property is the subject of a right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.24.

subject_to_legal_reversion_4_25.name: subject_to_legal_reversion_4_25
subject_to_legal_reversion_4_25.description: The immovable property is the subject of a right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.25.

household_effects_subject_to_legal_rever.name: household_effects_subject_to_legal_reversion_4_24
household_effects_subject_to_legal_rever.description: The household effects present in the immovable property are the subject of a right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.24.

household_effects_subject_to_legal_rever.name: household_effects_subject_to_legal_reversion_4_25
household_effects_subject_to_legal_rever.description: The household effects present in the immovable property are the subject of a right of legal reversion referred to in article 4.25.

acquires_usufruct_of_family_residence.name: acquires_usufruct_of_family_residence
acquires_usufruct_of_family_residence.description: The surviving legally cohabiting partner acquires the usufruct of the immovable property that served as the family principal residence.

acquires_usufruct_of_household_effects.name: acquires_usufruct_of_household_effects
acquires_usufruct_of_household_effects.description: The surviving legally cohabiting partner acquires the usufruct of the household effects present in the family principal residence.

exercises_usufruct_of_family_residence.name: exercises_usufruct_of_family_residence
exercises_usufruct_of_family_residence.description: The surviving legally cohabiting partner exercises the usufruct of the immovable property that served as the family principal residence, notwithstanding a right of legal reversion.

exercises_usufruct_of_household_effects.name: exercises_usufruct_of_household_effects
exercises_usufruct_of_household_effects.description: The surviving legally cohabiting partner exercises the usufruct of the household effects present in the family principal residence, notwithstanding a right of legal reversion.

property_subject_to_any_legal_reversion.name: property_subject_to_any_legal_reversion
property_subject_to_any_legal_reversion.description: The immovable property is subject to a right of legal reversion under article 4.24 or article 4.25.

household_effects_subject_to_any_legal_r.name: household_effects_subject_to_any_legal_reversion
household_effects_subject_to_any_legal_r.description: The household effects in the property are subject to a right of legal reversion under article 4.24 or article 4.25.
